features.featureTitle: Audit and fix all bugs in the video call feature end-to-end: the video call button in both FriendListItem (Friends panel) and PrivateChatView header must correctly open the VideoCallModal; the useVideoCall hook must successfully request and initialise the local camera/microphone media stream without errors; mute (audio) and camera toggle controls must reflect the correct state and actually mute/unmute or enable/disable the corresponding media track; ending the call must stop all media tracks, release the stream, and close/unmount the VideoCallModal cleanly; and the simulated 'Calling…' → 'Connected' state transition must work as intended. Ensure no unhandled promise rejections or console errors occur during the full call lifecycle.
